details.reasoning: Perfect implementation. All requirements met: (1) New ImageTextToTextPipeline class with async _call method present; (2) Accepts images and text prompts, processing both together; (3) Uses AutoModelForImageTextToText imported and registered; (4) Calls model.generate() correctly; (5) Handles pixel_values from processor and returns generated_text objects; (6) Properly registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS as 'image-text-to-text' with type 'multimodal'; (7) Comprehensive JSDoc with @typedef for ImageTextToTextSingle, ImageTextToTextOutput, callback definition, and pipeline type; (8) Follows existing pipeline patterns (extends Pipeline, matches ImageToTextPipeline structure); (9) No modifications to existing classes. Implementation correctly handles batching, prompt cycling, and output formatting.
